upa-√kṣip P. -kṣipati, to throw at, hurl against,  BhP. ;  Sāh. ;
to beat, strike,  ŚBr. ;
to strike with words, insult, accuse, insinuate,  R. ;
to allude, hint at,  Sāh. ;  Mṛcch. ;  Daś. ;
to speak of, describe, define,  Sāh. ;  Sarvad. ;
to commence, set about (a work),  Mall.

results.rendered_html:
upakṣip 6 P.
1 To throw at, cast on, hurl against; vapuṣi vadhāya tatra tava śastramupakṣipataḥ  Māl. 5. 31 ; to direct; tvayi upakṣipta ātmā  M. 2 ; to entrust, assign;  M. 3. 
2 To insult, upbraid, accuse, charge with; parasparaṃ vāgbhirupakṣipaṃti  Rām. 
3 To throw out (a hint), hint, indicate, put forth, adduce; channaṃ kāryamupakṣipaṃti  Mk. 9. 3 ; iti upakṣiptamanena  Mu. 1 ;  Māl. 1. 
4 To throw down.
5 To commence, introduce, set on foot, begin; upakṣiptamanena kimapi  Mu. 1 ;  K. 162 ;  Dk. 59 ; upakṣipto bhittibaṃdhaḥ  M. 5.
